text:
Vercuric HOLY SHIT THE MAN HIMSELF 

I can’t tell you how much I love this and all of your videos, man. I grew up on these, and me and me and my brother quote these almost daily. Thanks for all the memories man, hard to believe it’s been a decade.
author: @MarioYoshi4723

text: @MarioYoshi4723  lol, that's nice to hear! I have brother as well and we've both spent nearly half our lives quoting from great YTPs every day. Props to iteachvader and the "Help Wanted" video (watch?v=wsAAI67YWsI). dingdong "OAH! Goaway!" is the best intro to any YTP I've ever seen and I quote that almost daily too.
author: @Vercuric

text:
@Vercuric  that is awesome! I can't believe I happened to find this, and nearly passed it by, but I saw the "traitor your majesty" in the title and clicked on it fast. I'm amazed at the quality and hard work that went into making this timeless masterpiece, I thought it was made this year tbh. 

Thank you for being part of the YTP era and still replying to comments.

text:
Vercuric
You said you were making these in your free time until you had a job... do you have that job now?
author: @Biggaah

text: +TheBiggaproductions Yeah, I actually got the job I wanted while working on this video. I have worked on a few poop projects between then and now, but most weren't funny and ended up being frustrating wastes of time. The one project I did like was CDi vs. Predator, but when I uploaded an unlisted version to show some friends YouTube immediately censored it for using footage from Predator. I had the option of contesting it under a Fair Use clause, since it probably would qualify as a parody, but I'm in Canada and not 100% certain if I could get away with doing that. Plus it wasn't finished, so I just gave up on it. If I ever do finish it, I might try creating a new account and uploading it there so I don't risk losing this channel's history if the copyright thing doesn't work out.
